input.find: Before the violin ever reached her bench, the old master had already learned to watch closely when his favorite student grew quiet. She was a once-in-a-century talent, but not because others were fools. She simply saw connections faster and farther than most, and her hands could follow where her mind had gone.
input.replace: Before the violin ever reached her bench, the old master had already learned to watch closely when his favorite student grew quiet. She was a once-in-a-century talent, and his favorite not for brilliance alone, but for the steadiness of her eye and hand. She simply saw connections a little faster and farther than most, and her hands could follow where her mind had gone.
